channel.title: Daw on jamesm.blog
channel.description: Recent content in Daw on jamesm.blog

item.title: The Best Music Production Software in 2026
item.description: A 2026 tour of the DAWs worth building a studio around - Ableton Live 12, Logic Pro 12, Cubase 15, Fender Studio Pro 8, Bitwig 6, Reason 14, and the first wave of AI-native workstations.

item.title: Music Production: Ableton Live 12
item.description: Overview of Ableton Live 12 features, new devices, MIDI tools, pricing, and learning resources.

item.title: Music Production Blogs
item.description: Curated list of music production blogs covering DAWs, music theory, synthesis, and production techniques.

item.title: Music Production Courses
item.description: Comprehensive list of music production courses from major platforms covering all popular DAWs and production techniques.
